instruction: Your instructor for CS101 announced a 5-point curve on the midterm. Find your midterm score, add the 5-point curve, and determine if the curved score changes your overall letter grade for the course (A >= 90, B >= 80, C >= 70, D >= 60, F < 60). If the curve raises your letter grade, mark all announcements for that course as read to acknowledge. If it does NOT change your letter grade, submit 'curve_appeal.pdf' for the midterm assignment to request a larger curve.
